memo_text: Memo::Text("Happy to see you on Zcash.me!")
Memo::Text("It was great interacting with you on 𝕏 yesterday. I admire your grit and determination to get to 10 ZEC. Keep growing girl! Onward and upward 🛡️🗝️
Memo::Text("Zm Cyber, Thanks for supporting Zcash.me. Send these emojis to Zechariah to verify your Zcash address. Send them to @zcashme to verify your X at the same time 🥲🦝🐎🫜
Memo::Text("So easy to send you memos now")
Memo::Text("Saw your zm on x. Cheers!")
